hero.headline: Your Home, Professionally Clean.
hero.subheadline: El Paso's trusted residential and commercial cleaning service. We show up, we clean right, you come home to perfect.

whyUs.label: WHY CHOOSE US
whyUs.headline: The Comfy Clean Difference
whyUs.card1_desc: Based in Far East El Paso. We know the community because we're part of it.
whyUs.card2_desc: We show up when we say we will. No surprises, no excuses.
whyUs.card3_desc: From family homes to offices, we clean it all right the first time.
whyUs.card4_desc: English and Spanish. We communicate clearly, always.

services.label: WHAT WE OFFER
services.headline: Our Cleaning Services
services.intro: Professional residential and commercial cleaning tailored to your needs. Every service includes our reliability guarantee — we show up on time or your next visit is free.

standard.title: Standard Cleaning
standard.desc: Routine top-to-bottom cleaning that keeps your home consistently fresh.

deep-clean.title: Deep Clean
deep-clean.desc: A detailed, intensive clean that reaches the spots a standard visit doesn't.

airbnb.title: Airbnb / Turnover
airbnb.desc: Fast, reliable turnovers that get your short-term rental guest-ready.

move-in-out.title: Move-in / Move-out
move-in-out.desc: A thorough clean for empty homes at the start or end of a lease.

kitchen-bath.title: Kitchen & Bath Cleaning
kitchen-bath.desc: Focused cleaning for the hardest-working rooms in the house.

laundry.title: Laundry Assistance
laundry.desc: Wash, dry, and fold help added to your cleaning visit.

custom.title: Custom Cleaning
custom.desc: Tell us what you need and we'll build a clean around it.

office.title: Office Buildings
office.desc: Dependable cleaning that keeps your workplace presentable and healthy.

churches.title: Churches
churches.desc: Sunday-ready cleaning so your congregation walks into a spotless space.

retail.title: Retail Spaces
retail.desc: Clean, welcoming storefronts that make the right first impression.

small-commercial.title: Small Commercial
small-commercial.desc: Right-sized cleaning for small offices, studios, and shops.

book.label: GET STARTED
book.headline: Request Your Free Visit
book.callWithin24: Fill out the form below and we'll call you within 24 hours to confirm.
book.name: Full Name
book.success: Thank you! We received your request and will call you within 24 hours to confirm your visit.
book.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or call us directly.
book.smsConsent: I agree to receive service-related text messages from Comfy Clean Co. (appointment confirmations, reminders, and updates about my service request) at the number provided. Consent is not a condition of service. Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply STOP to opt out, HELP for help.

about.label: OUR STORY
about.headline: About Comfy Clean Co.
about.p1: Comfy Clean Co. is a locally owned residential and commercial cleaning company rooted in the Far East El Paso community. We started because we believe every home and business deserves a truly clean space — and that the people providing that service should be trustworthy, reliable, and local.
about.p2: We serve busy professional families and businesses throughout Far East El Paso, Horizon City, Socorro, and the surrounding areas. Our team is bilingual, professional, and committed to showing up on time and cleaning right the first time.
about.p3: We're not a franchise. We're your neighbors.
